monitor_the_situation.title: US Expands Airstrikes Across Southern Iran After Ceasefire Collapses
Iran Launches Ballistic Missiles and Drones at Kuwait and Bahrain; Air Defenses Intercept Most Projectiles
Iran Strikes US Fifth Fleet Base in Bahrain With Ballistic Missiles and Drones, Sirens Sound Across Multiple Gulf States

— S4 · Conflict · Manama, Bahrain · 1d ago. Iran has launched drone strikes against Bahrain, targeting the U.S. Fifth Fleet Headquarters, in retaliation for recent U.S. strikes on Iranian military infrastructure.
US Strikes Iranian Air Defense, Ports, and Missile Sites in Major Escalation
— S4 · Conflict · Iran · 1d ago. A US official tells Axios the current strikes on Iran are four to five times larger in scope and power than strikes 10 days ago.
